corrected_argv_validation_evidence.note: Real local validation (same D1b validation environment, dotnet 10.0.302) proving the corrected argv genuinely completes against the same freshly restored source tree: real VSTest completion summary produced, exit code 0.
corrected_argv_validation_evidence.observed_vstest_summary: Passed!  - Failed:     0, Passed:    61, Skipped:     0, Total:    61, Duration: 5 s - KubeOps.Generator.Test.dll (net10.0)

entries.correction_rule: The exact pinned source commit and frozen test target are unchanged. Real capture evidence (CI runs #7 through #12 of qodec-n2d1b-miner-pilot.yml) shows the unmodified frozen argv, run confined with network denied AFTER a real, successful trusted `dotnet restore` on the exact same fresh source tree, still performs its own implicit re-restore and fails with NU1301 ("Unable to load the service index for source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json") -- `dotnet test` always re-verifies/re-restores unless told not to. Appending only `--no-restore` is the smallest possible fix that suppresses this one redundant, already-satisfied action; it does not retarget the project, change test selection, alter the target framework, or touch `--no-build`. This correction does not change the source, tool, command class, case family, selected primary role, or corpus quotas.

original_confined_run_evidence.note: Real confined-run output under the UNCHANGED frozen argv, captured by CI run #9 (workflow run 29425497514, commit cf89173, job pilot-repo-kubeops-generator-capture-a) -- trusted restore had already succeeded (the failure is a content-acceptance rejection, never a 'trusted dotnet restore failed' exception), yet the confined `dotnet test` (no --no-restore) still attempted its own implicit restore under network denial and failed with NU1301.

trusted_restore_evidence.note: Real trusted `dotnet restore` executed against the exact fresh, verified (archive-sha256-matched) pinned-commit source tree, network allowed, independent of and prior to any confined capture -- dotnet 10.0.302 (local D1b validation environment; CI's own pinned dotnet-version is 10.0.x/actions/setup-dotnet, not required to be byte-identical for this rationale-validating evidence).

entries.correction_rule: The exact pinned source commit is unchanged. The frozen tree contains no src/ directory. The real package source directory is pyflakes/. The original command therefore cannot perform its intended static-analysis workload. Replacing only the nonexistent assumed source root with the actual package root is the smallest evidence-based correction. This correction does not change the source, tool, command class, case family, selected primary role, or corpus quotas. Not '.', not pytest/tox/flake8, not any other workload.
entries.original_stderr_text: src/: No such file or directory

producing_investigation_context.note: Original dry run and tree verification performed directly against the durable n2d0-durable-evidence-v1 release asset (n2c-acquisition-repo-pyflakes.zip), independent of any N2-C committed registry field.

rule: An erratum is authorized ONLY under one of two narrow classes, never a silent substitution, and never a change to N2-C's own files: (A) path correction -- the frozen argv is provably unexecutable against the exact frozen, pinned-commit source tree (a real 'no such file or directory' / equivalent failure, not a toolchain or dependency issue), and the correction is the smallest possible fix (replacing only the nonexistent assumed path with the real one); or (B) confinement-implicit-network-suppression correction -- the frozen argv is otherwise correct against the real source tree, but performs an implicit, redundant network-dependent action (e.g. its own re-restore) under the sandbox's legitimate, permanent network denial, EVEN AFTER a documented, real trusted restore/setup succeeded on the exact same fresh source tree used for confinement, and the correction is the smallest possible fix that suppresses ONLY that redundant action (e.g. appending a single --no-restore-style flag), never retargeting the project, test selection, framework, or build configuration. Either class must change nothing else about the case (source, tool, command class, family, primary/alternate role, quotas).
